feedback.text: There are several laws or practises that are in need of review, espacially in the EU. I am from germany and our country does not have a good track record in understanding Technology in time, or even in a reasonable manner. Same goes for a lot of EU countrys, that has sadly mainly to do with missing knowledge or the will to educate themselfs. Therefore I will try to explain the unfair practices shot but decisesive: Lets start with the cookie apocalypse, the EU imposed a law that dictates that companys have to give users a choice what data is tracked and which is not. The Idea was to opt out of unessery tracking. Now we have to agree or disagree on every page, because the law was flawed and purposeful misused. Instead of saying that you automaticly opt out of everything. No company has a right to collect this data, if they want it block the site from functioning. That would really fast stop them from collecting because, people would stop using their site if the hassle is to big to use it. Therefore only the worst companys would still try to impose predetory practices and they would be forced to blackout their sites if they do so. Customer protected, problem solved. Again they dont have any right to collect data even if you go to their place, its the same as when a shoestore would tell you that all of your payment processes, shoesize, adress, likeness, behavior, route and everything you touched will get tracked and eventually sold to someone we the shoestore please. Just for stepping trough the door. Does not seem right, doesn´t it? Next one: Stealing, withholding or otherwise stopping a legit customer from using what they bought. For some time now companys try to push ownership to the side in favor of liecences, even doe they pretend to sell a product instead of a liecence. But dont get me wrong my Idea is not for making labels thats useless. I think these companys should simple not be allowed to sell them as a liecence in the first place, because it isnt. As the medium was still physical this was no problem but now it is. They try to withhold ownership at every evenue, mainly to make Profit by withholding or forcing customer behavior. Take it away and you have no choice to buy the new product, the liecensing agreements are so anti customer, I dont even have say alot, they literally state they can/will take away what you bought at some point without reason or explaination, no compensation and they dont have to explain why. Its written like this in almost every liecense agreement nowadays, some of them even braking existing laws, without a timely response from goverments or lawenforcements. This has to change, all of this happens on a day by day basis nowadays without public or mainly political recognition. Gaming as laught upon as it is, generates more Money then the movie industry. I have no Idea why this is not already adressed, instead of playing Word police on the Internet. Lets make an example: I have a new PC, completly new, some parts only Weeks old out of the factory. I play an Online game I payed for, their detection system does not recognize my hardware or some component. I get banned in this game, now I cant use my product anymore, because the company made a mistake. You say ok tell them, does not work, the Code I got implies something out of their Liecenseagreement that is not allowed, therefore I am not allowed to asked what the problem is, I do not get Information or a refund, nothing all of this is just excluded at their discretion. I´m pretty sure that would be illigeal in most countrys. What can I do? Sue a multimillion dollor company? Not even my lawyer or the Jugde understands, the agreement. Its designed like this on purpose. There is so much more I could write down: I try to include a little list - Microtransactions (Targeting children/gambling) - EMailprovider AD´s no way of changing, cant opt out. - Internet Provider monopoly (Germany, prices are extortion, Goverment aproved (Coruption) And so on.
